title: mentha aquatica f. caput-medusae
intro: Mentha aquatica f. caput-medusae, also known as the 'Medusa's Head' or 'Wild Horseradish Mint', is a variant of the water mint plant, characterized by its distinctive, multi-headed appearance. The medicinal properties of Mentha aquatica f. caput-medusae include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating digestive issues and infections. The health benefits of this plant include relief from nausea, indigestion, and headaches, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Mentha aquatica f. caput-medusae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies, as well as being a popular ingredient in natural skincare products.
